title: Fix blog pagination cursor bug and expose blog categories via API
description:
Two backend issues to fix:

## Issue 1 — Infinite pagination in blog

File: /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/backend/app/api/v1/blog/repository.py

The cursor-based pagination uses UUID comparison: `WHERE BlogPost.id > cursor ORDER BY BlogPost.id`. UUIDs are not sequentially ordered by insertion time (UUID v4 is random), so the `id > cursor` comparison does NOT correctly paginate. Posts may appear in wrong order or `next_cursor` may never exhaust all posts, causing infinite load.

Fix: change pagination to use `published_at` + `id` as composite cursor for stable ordering:
- ORDER BY published_at DESC, id DESC
- Cursor encodes (published_at, id) pair — encode as base64 JSON string
- WHERE clause: (published_at, id) < (cursor_published_at, cursor_id)
- next_cursor = base64-encode({published_at: items[-1].published_at.isoformat(), id: str(items[-1].id)}) if len(posts) > per_page else None

Also check /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/backend/app/api/v1/blog/service.py and /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/backend/app/api/v1/blog/router.py — verify the `next_cursor` is properly passed through to response.

Also check /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/backend/app/api/v1/blog/schemas.py — verify BlogListResponse has `next_cursor: str | None` and `total: int`.

## Issue 2 — Blog categories API endpoint missing or not exposed

Model BlogCategory exists in /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/backend/app/db/models/blog.py (table: blog_categories). The repository has `get_categories()` method. Need to verify:
1. Does GET /api/v1/blog/categories endpoint exist in router.py?
2. If not — add it. Response: list of {id, name, slug, description, post_count}
3. The frontend admin needs to manage blog categories separately from product categories (table: categories). Blog categories are in blog_categories table.

Add endpoint GET /api/v1/admin/blog/categories if not present — admin endpoint to list/create/update/delete blog categories.

Files to check and modify:
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/backend/app/api/v1/blog/repository.py
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/backend/app/api/v1/blog/service.py
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/backend/app/api/v1/blog/router.py
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/backend/app/api/v1/blog/schemas.py
acceptance_criteria: Blog list pagination stops when there are no more posts (next_cursor is null when all posts fetched)
Pagination order is stable and chronological (by published_at DESC)
GET /api/v1/blog/categories returns list of blog categories (not product categories)
GET /api/v1/admin/blog/categories endpoint exists for admin CRUD
